title: Fine Oats Porridge
description: A smooth and comforting porridge made with finely ground oat flour. Perfect for a gentle start to your day.

steps.text: Mix cold water and oat flour in a pot.
Place on fire and stir continuously to avoid lumps.
Add honey or sweetener (optional).
Cook for 5 minutes.
Add milk if desired and serve.

title: Oat Flour Pancakes
description: Fluffy and nutritious pancakes made with Grainmill Oat Flour. A healthy twist on a classic breakfast favorite.

steps.text: Mix water or milk with cooking oil.
Add oat flour and baking powder, then stir well.
Add eggs, sweetener, and salt, then continue to stir until smooth.
Heat cooking oil in a hot pan.
Pour the batter and spread using a serving spoon.

title: Oat Flour Omelette
description: A protein-packed omelette reinforced with oat flour for extra texture and nutrition.

steps.text: Put oat flour into a bowl.
Mix with milk or water and set aside for 10 minutes.
Add salt, black pepper, and the remaining ingredients (vegetables).
Stir until well combined.
Add eggs as the final ingredient.
Heat cooking oil in a pan.
Pour the mixture and spread slowly using a serving spoon.

title: Oat Flour Waffles
description: Crispy and delicious waffles made with wholesome oat flour.

steps.text: In a bowl, add milk and butter.
Add egg and whisk together.
Add oat flour, baking powder, and a pinch of salt.
Let the batter rest for 10 minutes.
Prepare your waffle maker by lightly oiling it.
Pour the batter when the waffle maker is hot enough.

title: Oat Flour Ugali
description: A nutritious alternative to traditional ugali, made with healthy Grainmill Oat Flour.

steps.text: Bring water to a boil in a pot.
Set aside 1/2 cup of hot water for later use.
Add oat flour and stir continuously until combined.
Add the reserved hot water.
Cover and cook for 3 minutes on medium heat.
Stir for a moment after 3 minutes.
Serve with vegetables of your choice.

title: Yoghurt Smoothie
description: A refreshing and probiotic-rich smoothie featuring QuickBreakfast oats.

steps.text: Put QuickBreakfast oats into a blender.
Add the yoghurt and blend until smooth.
Serve warm or cold with fruits as toppings.

title: Peanut Butter Smoothie
description: A high-protein smoothie with the rich taste of peanut butter and the goodness of jumbo oats.

steps.text: Combine all ingredients in a blender.
Blend until perfectly smooth.
Serve warm or cold.

title: Nut Smoothie
description: A creamy and nutty smoothie using QuickBreakfast oats and almonds.

steps.text: Add all ingredients together in a blender.
Blend until smooth.
Serve warm or cold.

title: Green Smoothie
description: A detoxifying and nutrient-dense green smoothie with jumbo oats and spinach.

steps.text: Add all ingredients into a blender.
Blend until smooth.
Serve warm or cold.

title: Quick Oatmeal Porridge
description: A fast and satisfying oatmeal porridge for those busy mornings.

steps.text: Boil water for 5 minutes.
Add QuickBreakfast oats and milk, stirring continuously for a few minutes.
Set the mixture aside to cool.
Add honey and top with dried fruits like raisins.

title: Oats Dessert
description: A healthy and fruity dessert made with QuickBreakfast oats.

steps.text: Mix oats, banana, and honey.
Stir continuously until well combined.
Portion the mixture into small dessert glasses or tins.
Freeze for one hour.
Remove from freezer and decorate with yoghurt and fresh berries.

title: Overnight Jumbo Oats
description: The perfect grab-and-go breakfast prepared the night before for maximum creaminess.

steps.text: Add jumbo oats, milk, yoghurt, chia seeds, and salt into a jar with a lid.
Stir together until well combined.
Place in the fridge overnight.
Serve cold or warm as preferred.

title: Toasted Oats in a Pan
description: Crunchy toasted oats with seeds and nuts, prepared quickly on the stovetop.

steps.text: Melt butter or coconut oil in a pan.
Add jumbo oats and stir for toasting.
Add sunflower seeds, pumpkin seeds, and cashew nuts, continuing to stir.
Serve and let cool for 15 minutes.
Add preferred dried fruits as toppings.

title: Jumbo Oats Granola
description: Homemade granola with jumbo oats, seeds, and raisins for a perfect breakfast crunch.

steps.text: Mix jumbo oats, sunflower seeds, and melted coconut oil well.
Transfer the mixture onto a baking tray lined with parchment paper.
Bake at 180 degrees until golden brown.
Add dry ingredients like sultanas and raisins.
Store in an airtight jar.
Serve with yoghurt and fresh fruits.

title: Steel Cut Oats Porridge
description: A hearty, chewy porridge made with traditional steel cut oats.

steps.text: Boil water or milk in a small pot.
Add 3 tablespoons of steel cut oats.
Cook for 25 minutes.
Add preferred toppings and enjoy.

title: Steel Cut Vegetable Rice
description: A savory use for steel cut oats, prepared like a vegetable rice dish.

steps.text: Sauté onions, tomatoes, garlic, and other spices in oil.
Add the steel cut oats and mix well with the vegetables.
Add one glass of water and cover.
Allow to cook for 5 minutes.
